title: valerianoides scaberrima
intro: Valerianoides scaberrima, also known as roughstemmed valerian, is a flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a sedative and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Valerianoides scaberrima include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Valerianoides scaberrima can be prepared as teas, tinctures, or dried flowers for medicinal use, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
